markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Shutdown / Shut Down
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump says Shutdown / Shut Down as part of remarks to the Republican Members Issues Conference, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the remarks to the Republican Members Issues Conference will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the remarks to the Republican Members Issues Conference will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
- The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. - Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
- For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. 
- Additional content not included in the original broadcast or stream will not count. 
- Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
- The event must be opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event to qualify.
- Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
- Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
- If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  

Postponement:
- If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.
markets.title: What will Donald Trump say during remarks to the Republican Members Issues Conference?
markets.yes_sub_title: Shutdown / Shut Down

markets.rules_primary: If || Person || says Canada / Canadian as part of || Address ||, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Video of the || Address || will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, transcripts of the || Address || will be used according to the news publications listed in the contract. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. Plural nouns used as or within a proper nouns (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included. Please see full rules for more details. For the purposes of this market, “next Governor Kathy Hochul announcement” refers to the first livestream on the Governor Kathy Hochul main YouTube channel (@GovernorKathyHochul) after March 6th, 2026 at 2:30 PM ET. The livestream will resolve based on Kathy Hochul speaking in an official capacity. If Kathy Hochul is present during a livestream, but does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic). Additional source agency streams can be used in the event of technical outages or if Governor Kathy Hochul ends the stream prior to the conclusion of the event. For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
